name: batch_execute
description: Execute multiple tool calls in a single round trip. MUCH faster than calling tools one at a time — use this whenever you need to make 2 or more tool calls. Each entry specifies a tool name and its arguments. Tools run sequentially so earlier results (e.g. created GameObjects) are available to later calls. Example: create 3 objects and set their colors in one batch instead of 6 separate calls.

calls.description: Array of tool calls to execute in order.

arguments.description: The arguments to pass to the tool, same as if calling it directly.
